description:
You are a mobile build engineer reviewing yesterday’s Android pipeline logs.  
    A colleague needs a concise list of every WARNING that appeared during the run.

    1. Source log  
       • Absolute path: /home/user/build_logs/android_build_2023-11-01.log  
       • This file already exists and is readable. Do **not** modify it.

    2. What you must produce  
       • Create a new file at exactly  
         /home/user/build_logs/warning_summary_2023-11-01.txt  
       • The file must contain only the WARNING lines from the source log, each
         prefixed by its original line-number in the source file, in ascending
         order.

            Required text format (one entry per line):
            Line <line_number>: <unchanged_original_log_line>

         Example pattern (do not hard-code these numbers, generate them):
            Line 17: [2023-11-01 09:01:55] WARNING: Something happened

       • There must be **no extra blank lines** before, after, or between
         entries. End the file with a single trailing newline (POSIX style).

    3. Constraints  
       • Accomplish the extraction with a single shell command (you may use a
         pipeline of built-ins like grep, cut, awk, sed, etc.).  
       • Do NOT open an editor manually.  
       • Do NOT alter the original log file.  
       • The only artefact you create or change is the summary file above.

    When finished, you can cat the summary file so I can quickly verify it.
truth:
Initial state:
        Directory /home/user/build_logs exists with 0755 permissions.

        File /home/user/build_logs/android_build_2023-11-01.log
        (mode 0644, size 406 bytes) contains exactly:

[2023-11-01 10:00:00] INFO: Build started
[2023-11-01 10:00:05] WARNING: Deprecated API usage in module 'auth'
[2023-11-01 10:00:10] INFO: Compiling resources
[2023-11-01 10:00:12] WARNING: Unused variable in file MainActivity.kt
[2023-11-01 10:00:15] ERROR: Compilation failed
[2023-11-01 10:00:20] INFO: Build finished with errors

    Verification expectations after the agent runs:
        File /home/user/build_logs/warning_summary_2023-11-01.txt must exist
        (mode can be default 0644) and its content must be **exactly**

Line 2: [2023-11-01 10:00:05] WARNING: Deprecated API usage in module 'auth'
Line 4: [2023-11-01 10:00:12] WARNING: Unused variable in file MainActivity.kt

        followed by a single trailing newline (i.e., the file ends with \n).

    Automated tests will:
        1. Check that the original log remains unchanged (SHA-256 digest match).
        2. Read the summary file and compare its content bit-for-bit with the
           expected two-line output above plus the single trailing newline.
        3. Confirm the summary file resides at the exact path specified.
